name: Improper Handling of Alternate Encoding
description: The product does not properly handle input that uses an alternate encoding valid on the destination system (e.g., UTF-8 overlong sequences, URL encoding, HTML entity encoding), allowing attackers to bypass security filters that only check one encoding form.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data in an alternate encoding that bypasses CONTROL[input_filter] checking the canonical form, while the downstream EXTERNAL or TRANSFORM decodes the alternate encoding and processes the dangerous content without a TRANSFORM[decode_then_validate] that normalizes encoding before security checks
